option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Pane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.markbaengine.controller.DashboardController" styleClass="app-root"> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12" styleClass="top-bar"> <padding> <Insets top="14" right="24" bottom="14" left="24"/> </padding> <Label text="MarkbaEngine" styleClass="top-logo"/> <Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="welcomeLabel" styleClass="muted-text"/> <Button text="Logout" onAction="#logout" styleClass="ghost-button"/> </HBox> </top> <center> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="30" styleClass="dashboard-content"> <padding> <Insets top="40" right="40" bottom="40" left="40"/> </padding>
<FlowPane alignment="CENTER" hgap="24" vgap="24" prefWrapLength="1100" styleClass="dash-grid"> <Button text="Vehicles" onAction="#openVehicles" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Vehicle Models" onAction="#openModels" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Depots / Workshops" onAction="#openDepots" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Mechanics" onAction="#openMechanics" styleClass="dash-card"/>
<Button text="Suppliers" onAction="#openSuppliers" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Spare Parts" onAction="#openSpareParts" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Maintenance Logs" onAction="#openMaintenance" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Part Usage" onAction="#openPartUsage" styleClass="dash-card"/>
<Button text="Reports / Joins" onAction="#openReports" styleClass="dash-card, dash-card-accent"/> </FlowPane> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Pane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.markbaengine.controller.DashboardController" styleClass="app-root"> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12" styleClass="top-bar"> <padding> <Insets top="14" right="24" bottom="14" left="24"/> </padding> <Label text="MarkbaEngine" styleClass="top-logo"/> <Pane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label fx:id="welcomeLabel" styleClass="muted-text"/> <Button text="Logout" onAction="#logout" styleClass="ghost-button"/> </HBox> </top> <center> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="30" styleClass="dashboard-content"> <padding> <Insets top="40" right="40" bottom="40" left="40"/> </padding>
<FlowPane alignment="CENTER" hgap="24" vgap="24" prefWrapLength="1100" styleClass="dash-grid"> <Button text="Vehicles" onAction="#openVehicles" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Vehicle Models" onAction="#openModels" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Depots / Workshops" onAction="#openDepots" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Mechanics" onAction="#openMechanics" styleClass="dash-card"/>
<Button text="Suppliers" onAction="#openSuppliers" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Spare Parts" onAction="#openSpareParts" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Maintenance Logs" onAction="#openMaintenance" styleClass="dash-card"/> <Button text="Part Usage" onAction="#openPartUsage" styleClass="dash-card"/>
<Button text="Reports / Joins" onAction="#openReports" styleClass="dash-card dash-card-accent"/> </FlowPane> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane>
